# Artem Protasov (ART PROTO)

> Head of AI Innovations, R&D Director and Chief AI Officer (CAIO) with 6+ years building generative-AI products. Has shipped 8+ AI products from 0→1 to profitability. Open to Head of AI / R&D Director / CAIO roles with US or EU relocation, visa sponsorship, and remote work.

## Summary

Artem Protasov is an AI engineer and leader who pairs an engineer's depth with a founder's instinct. He sets AI strategy and personally architects the systems behind it — multi-agent systems, RAG pipelines and generative engines — and takes products all the way from idea to architecture to production. His focus is measurable impact on speed, cost and creative output rather than demos.

## Expertise

- AI strategy and AI leadership (CAIO / Head of AI / R&D Director)
- AI agents and multi-agent (autonomous) systems
- RAG architectures, LLM orchestration, Model Context Protocol (MCP)
- Prompt and context engineering
- Generative image and video pipelines, TTS and audio, lip sync, upscaling, FFmpeg post-production
- Backend & infrastructure: Python, TypeScript, FastAPI, Flask, SQLAlchemy, React, Node.js, vector databases (Qdrant, Milvus, pgvector), PostgreSQL, Redis, Docker, MLOps / LLMOps
- 0→1 product launches, unit economics and monetization, B2B/B2C platform growth

## Key achievements

- Cut creative production costs ~40–45% at BBDO Group while shipping creative 3–4× faster.
- Brought a B2B AI platform to profitability from scratch: 50+ external data sources unified, +35% partner sales on average.
- Founded and scaled 8+ AI products from 0→1, including autonomous agents that close deals end to end.

## Selected projects

- [StoryLiner AI](https://www.storyliner.online/): automated storyboard generation for film and advertising — scripts into visual narratives with AI.
- [Promotron AI](https://promotron.art-proto.com/): autonomous AI video-marketing engine that generates, edits and publishes short-form video to TikTok, Shorts and Reels.
- [Vision Insight AI](https://video.art-proto.com/): AI-powered strategic analysis of advertising video content.
- [Trender AI](https://trender.art-proto.com/): AI trend-to-brand engine for marketing text from real-time trend analysis.
- [AI Listing Studio](https://listing.art-proto.com/): high-converting e-commerce listing and product-description generation.
- [StickerPunk AI](https://t.me/Sticker_Punk_bot): conversational AI agent generating sticker packs in Telegram.
- [VSUDU](https://vsudu.com/?lang=en): online travel marketplace with AI matching.
- [AccompParts](https://accomparts.com/): multichain decentralized platform for curating and auctioning computer art with smart contracts.

## Brands & collaborations

Adobe, Amazon, ByteDance (TikTok), Yandex, Etihad Airways, Binance, General Agents, NASA, and BBDO Group (Instinct Creative Agency).

## Education

- HSE University (Higher School of Economics), Moscow — Master's, Media Management (2026).
- HSE University (Higher School of Economics), Moscow — Bachelor's, Media Communications (2024).

## Languages

- English — C1
- Russian — Native
